activity_name: Register the Name of the patient

llm_result.activity_name: Register the Name of the patient

ground_truth_steps.description: Enter the name into the registration system

response_steps.description: Enter the first and middle name(s) into the HIS.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps describe the action of inputting the patient's name into a system. 'registration system' and 'HIS' (Hospital Information System) are functionally equivalent in this context, and 'name' vs 'first and middle name(s)' refers to the same core data being entered.

unmatched_ground_truth_steps.description: Ask the patient for their first name
unmatched_ground_truth_steps.reason: The response process obtains the patient's name from an official identification document rather than by directly asking the patient, indicating a different method of initial data collection.

unmatched_ground_truth_steps.description: Confirm the spelling of the name with the patient
unmatched_ground_truth_steps.reason: The response process does not include a step for verbally confirming the spelling of the name with the patient, likely relying on the accuracy and official nature of the identification document.

unmatched_response_steps.description: Request the patient's official identification document.
unmatched_response_steps.reason: The ground truth process does not involve requesting an official identification document; it relies on directly asking the patient for their name.

unmatched_response_steps.description: Read the patient's legal first and middle name(s) from the ID.
unmatched_response_steps.reason: The ground truth process does not involve reading the patient's name from an official identification document; it relies on directly asking the patient for their name.
